quotes.modified: Existing is common; living is rare.

quotes.original: Yes, you are not responsible for my love, Yes, you are not responsible for my feelings, Yes, you are not responsible for my life, But I am responsible for your happiness, I am responsible for the life you are in now...
Don't think that everyone will love you like me, as it is wrong, Don't think that my feelings will be only for you, as this is also a dream...
Falling in love is not great, even an uneducated person can fall in love but choosing a right person to love is the great thing......

Every time you say my name, I get energy of 1000 red bulls, The love looks you give me, takes me to cloud 9, Every message you type worth crores, The time you spend with me is valuable than my life...

Even my dreams understood my pain as we are not living together, so it is showing our together moments to make me happy..... But the most painful thing is Every time I dream we end up to break up......
Girls and sea waves are the same, they come near us and leave soon. Girls and programming are the same, they don't see the length or truth, they just catch the error.....

Baby just feel my love you fall in it, Baby just see the love in the things I do for you, Baby just think about the reason behind your happy life, Baby just look into my eyes you can watch the love which I will show you, Baby just observe them you will understand my love and feel my love for you...
I didn't ask your assets or money, I didn't ask you to come with me, I didn't even ask you to love me, I just said don't treat me as unknown.....

I may not reach your expectations, but I can love you in the way I know, I cannot rewrite your life but I can keep you in a happy mood as long as I am with you, You may don't love me, but don't treat me as unknown...
I don't care how I spend every second, but every second I spend with you must be like heaven ....

I had purchased whatever you dreamed, I had done whatever you ordered, I had bared pain for your happiness, I don't think anything else is left, if yes then tell me I am ready but don't treat me as unknown.....
Treat me as a frd, Treat me as a care taker, Treat me as a lover, But never treat me as an unknown because this heart can't tolerate it

I love you, you didn't believe it, you are my heart, you didn't believe, Your happiness is my happiness you didn't believe me, You didn't hear whatever I told you and didn't believe whatever I did to you, but don't forget as long as this heart beats it is for you only......

You have taught me the meaning of 4 letter word love, then why don't you say I love you, You have shown me the meaning of 4 letter word pain, then why don't you tell me I hate you, These two things may be small things in your life but in my life, they play a very crucial part ....

You don't know the pain I feel, You don't know how my dreams are becoming like hell, You don't know how much pain my heart bears, You don't know how my eyes show me the dark world, Without you my life has become null, I don't understand what is happening...

I don't know to hide love feeling like you, I don't know how to swallow the pain and continue the life, I don't know to forget people like you, As once a person enters heart he can never be removed.....

I don't know what our love story is doing in my dreams, I don't know what your happiness is doing in my life, I don't know why you are treated as a priority in my heart, I don't know why my steps always follow you, I don't know what your memories are doing in my life, I don't know what is happening and what is going to happen to me....

My mind has written the query for the love database, the result shows your name, My heart is increasing the frequency of the love so that it reaches you, My eyes linked to the Google, in search of your details......

Staring the moon daily has become bored but while staring at your photo every minute never bores me, Eating the same dish has become bored, but the food prepared by you never bores me, Staying in office use to be boring, but now I am feeling bored if I am out of office, I never cared about my life, but now after your presence in my life, it became precious.
where ever I am, However I may be, whatever I do, How far you may be, Until my heartbeat, my love is only for you........

When I entered my room first thing that strikes my mind is you, The first night out I did by thinking about you, The night out I did for writing first poetry for you, The night I spent waiting for your answer, the things in my room only know the pain I faced by recollecting those memories...

I didn't understand my love feelings for you until you have asked me, I didn't notice the cost of gift I purchased for you until my parents asked bank balance, I didn't realize your care until I am away from you for 1 week...

I don't know when our both life's lead to the same destination, I don't know when our hearts connect to each other, I don't know when our words become one, I don't know when you will realize my presence behind your happiness, I don't know when you will realize the importance of me in your life...
Love is nothing but, The thing which can show heaven everyday before going to heaven, It makes us forget cry, It shows a moon whole day, Without reason it brings happiness in our life...

There may be only 4 letters in love word but the happiness it gives can not be equal to diamond shoes or gold house life long. It has power of thunder, silently drags us into it like tsunami, It starts our feelings like cyclone slowly but later it takes whole life into its hand..
Sadranam ga janalu mandu tagutey ekestadi, Kani naku ento oka Prema story Kani movie gani chustey enka edo Prema pichi ekestundi.

Thinking someone else in your position in life is becoming very hard to digest, writing for someone else imagining you is also very hard as my heart doesn't coperate, Spending life with someone else is like hell after dreaming about our future .....

You have introduced love to the world which doesn't even know the meaning of it, You have introduced enjoyment to the life which doesn't even know what it is, But I didn't expect you will introduce me to sorrows by leaving me soon...

Writers wait for the feel to write but by hearing your name my mind start framing poetries, People feel only some days as special but baby every day is special for me as you are present everyday in my life, Lovers wait for opportunity to impress their dear ones, but your every word increases love inside me, Your presence is happy movement, your absence is like sorrow,

writing an exam needs a preparation, Cracking an interview needs experience, But writings about you don't even need any experience or preparation just a small amount of feel in the heart is more than enough...

Baby, you can't even imagine how much happiness I get by watching your smile, Baby, you don't even believe how your name repeats in my heart, Baby, you don't know how my eyes keep on staring you, Baby in your presence my mind is busy in staring at you, in your absence, my mind is busy dreaming you.....

People say think 2 to 3 times before doing any work, but I did more than 1 lakh times every time I feel you are for me. ok I am trying to forget you but unable to do it also as we may forget passwords but not the person who is precious than my life..

Hey baby My heart came to auction and but I rejected everyone's proposal for your love, Foreigners are waiting for my golden words but those are only for you, Baby billionaires are waiting to be a part of my life but this life belongs to you only...

Having you in my life like the sun in our solar system...

Two Good Habits That I Gave Up, Sharing you, Thinking about you...

Can a person like you say these words who is always busy in enjoyment? Mani- yes did I can only say this, some circumstances tells us array from the enjoyment? Before every someone be sure sure that they want to stay you in any circumstance, otherwise please don't move a wrong step...

After seeing you my life has been changed, After talking to you my playlist has been updated, After falling in love with you my thoughts process has been updated
The first time I ever made a small trip was for you, The last time my heart ever felt was only for you, The first time I couldn't share away was your face, The first time I loved was you...
We are not together but still don't forget that a soul here is always ready to chase your life whenever is needed...
I'm still looking for a person who can understand me and bear my mischievous....
When you love someone you may not stay that person but you will feel some vacuum in your life...

"I love you, Baby, you are only take care of me as who can understand me" "Thanks for these words, I too love you"
Anytime anywhere your heart may burst into flames, if you try to hide your inner feelings from someone.... So never try to hide something......

Happiness can be shared with anyone, Wealth can be shared with anyone, Blood can be shared with anyone, But the love which I can't share with anyone it is only for you... The day you will understand it, will know the value of my love...
Guess what baby, my heart use to recall our happy moments but now the heart is searching for happy moments as we are no more together
Do you remember when: We both had a cheerful chat, When we both had seen each other, When we both had passed something common to us in our personal diary........
Few lines of Story will bore you after some time but my writings on our love never bore me, as they bring more energy the word I write...
Baby things for you in life may change but the love on the playlist, heart arrange for you will never change.. Just try to listen it, you will miss it...
As long as my heart beats, your name is for you and another one is for me.
Three years ago, I was just an ordinary boy who use to dream about Love, but now I not only dream about you, I also convert my feelings for you in the form of words....
When we are together nothing else matters me, you are the one whom I care in this world...
I don't know why, I don't feel like sleeping at nights and I don't know why my heart starts dancing with the rhythm of the love beats during night times...

When I walk in your street, my heartbeat doubles, my eyes start searching for you in your balcony...

Out of all the people I know, my heart cares about you, even though you don't care about me..

Some people in life get attached to us so soon that their absence will dull our life....
Leaving you is like a sin it cannot be accept in melancholic life...
If I could meet you all over again then I would be happy if it happens, as it won't happen. If it happens I would say thanks for coming to my life, as I learned many things after your entrance....
Once upon a time, I use to think how people write poetries on love but after meeting you even I started writing on you..
I want to write something, I want to tell something, but I don't know what to say and whom to say. Thought of saying you but you are out of my reach....
Heart can melt any kind of metal, but it can't melt my love for you....
we can trust our pets but not friends because in the initial stage of friendship they treat us as a best friend but as days pass on best friend becomes a friend.....

Whoever happens in this world, everyone will show maximum 20 to 30% love to their friends... However much percentage it is, they themselves don't know it because... everyone will share their feelings only when necessary to share...

The time will not stay, change... the God will not stay, change... the years, dates will not stay, change... the things which will not stay, change... but friends never change... so be baby to have a friend like you in my life.. Happy friendship day to you ....
I like to wait for only those who don't think me as a burden or who treat me as a friend....
The best news I ever got in the morning was, friends calling and discussing the weekend plans...
